notes: Focused subset of Twilio's official OpenAPI (twilio_api_v2010.json) covering the Message resource on api.twilio.com/2010-04-01. The twilio adaptor exposes only sendSMS, which uses the Twilio Node client's messages.create -> POST /Accounts/{AccountSid}/Messages.json; that create endpoint plus the standard list/fetch/update/delete Message operations and the Media subresource (list/fetch) are included (7 operations). Request bodies are application/x-www-form-urlencoded as Twilio expects. Enums (status, direction) and schema field descriptions are taken verbatim from the upstream spec; components renamed to friendly names (Message, Media, MessageList, etc.) for the mocker. Calls, Lookups, and other Twilio resources are intentionally excluded as the adaptor does not call them.
